idle.title: Are you sure you want to leave?
idle.message: We're sorry to see you go. You won't receive emails from Natly anymore, but you can always come back whenever you want.
idle.reasonPlaceholder: Help us improve! Tell us why you're leaving (optional)

success.title: You've been unsubscribed
success.message: Your subscription has been successfully canceled.
success.subtitle: You won't receive any more emails from us.

already.title: Already unsubscribed
already.message: You had already canceled your subscription previously.

error.title: Error
error.message: We couldn't process your request. The link may have expired.
